title: Pure Core, UI Adapters, Dependency Direction, and Snapshots · Independent Program Trial
summary: An independent accessibility club receives a different grid, seed, algorithm, input profile, display scale, assistance need, platform, and failure condition and transfers pure core, ui adapters, dependency direction, and snapshots into a changed pure maze core with Tk adapter ports. Planned artifact: Produce an independent changed-context version of pure maze core with Tk adapter ports with automated and judgment evidence. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case prac…
objectives: Keep topology, generation, search, state transitions, and evidence free of Tk widget and operating-system dependencies.
Define narrow render, scheduling, input, status, dialog, persistence, and clock ports owned by the application layer.
Publish immutable or copied snapshots so rendering and tests cannot mutate authoritative state accidentally.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.python:
"""build-maze-solver-python cumulative accessible desktop maze portfolio.

Browser execution uses deterministic pure-Python grid, graph, search, state, and scheduler models
with original fixed in-memory fixtures only. Native Tcl, Tk, tkinter, windows, Canvas, fonts,
focus, input devices, assistive technology, files, platform timing, installers, display scaling,
packaging, and production effects require controlled transfer gates.
"""

from dataclasses import dataclass


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class MazePolicy:
    rows: int = 12
    columns: int = 16
    seed: int = 314159
    maximum_cells: int = 16_384
    reduced_motion: bool = False


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class MazeEvidence:
    revision: str
    topology_digest: str
    action_trace_digest: str
    accessibility_review_id: str
    artifact_digest: str


def portfolio_ready() -> str:
    return "Python maze solver portfolio ready"

steps.title: Maze solving, Tkinter, and Python Commit to the mission model · Lab Domain Core
steps.instruction:
lab case — A lab puzzle team handles case 8421 during a corrupted-state recovery drill. Build deterministic Python evidence to enforce a pure domain core, narrow UI ports, immutable snapshots, and testable dependency direction; resource use must remain below an explicit budget; then change the grid dimensions and preserve every invariant. Browser code uses pure bounded models and original fixed fixtures only. Real Tcl, Tk, tkinter, windows, Canvas, fonts, focus, input devices, assistive technology, files, platform timing, installers, and packaged desktop behavior require explicit controlled native transfer gates. steps.title: Maze solving, Tkinter, and Python Extend the cumulative artifact · Lab Architecture Evidence
steps.instruction:
Append a runnable pure-Python function headed "# Evidence: maze-architecture-evidence-bvx3gg" that uses case 7854 to enforce a pure domain core, narrow UI ports, immutable snapshots, and testable dependency direction. Keep its defaults runnable, assert an invariant, and return observable changed-case evidence. Browser code must not import or claim native tkinter, Tcl, Tk, windows, Canvas, fonts, focus, input devices, assistive technology, files, platform timing, installers, or packaged release behavior; verify those boundaries later with Python 3.14.6, recorded Tcl and Tk patch levels, native widget and display tests, keyboard and assistive-technology playtests, representative profiles, clean platform-native PyInstaller 6.21 builds, migration, rollback, recovery, and release gates.

Evidence target: Maze solving, Tkinter, and Python Extend the cumulative artifact · Lab Architecture Evidence.
steps.why: Building a runnable or mechanically reviewable artifact turns Architecture Evidence into observable performance evidence. For Maze solving, Tkinter, and Python Extend the cumulative artifact · Lab Architecture Evidence, keep Architecture Evidence connected to executable Python grid, topology, search, event, state, accessibility, package, and recovery decision evidence.

content.code:
# Evidence: maze-architecture-evidence-bvx3gg
# Competency: maze-architecture-evidence.
# Case 7854: a low-vision player session.
# Operating constraint: native Tk behavior must not be inferred from browser execution.
# Changed case: switch the solver or generator and restate each guarantee.
def evidence_maze_architecture_evidence_bvx3gg(domain_modules: int = 7, ui_imports_in_core: int = 0, adapter_ports: int = 6, fake_adapter_cases: int = 18, snapshot_mutations: int = 0) -> tuple[bool, int | float, str]:
    evidence_variant_bvx3gg = "bvx3gg-gg3xvb-7854"
    assert evidence_variant_bvx3gg
    evidence_axes_bvx3gg = (
        "gridbvx3gg",
        "topology7854",
        "searchgg3xvb",
        "eventbvx3gg7854",
        "access7854bvx3gg",
        "recoverygg3xvb7854",
    )
    assert len(set(evidence_axes_bvx3gg)) == 6
    if domain_modules < 1 or adapter_ports < 4:
        return False, adapter_ports, "architecture-shape"
    if ui_imports_in_core > 0:
        return False, ui_imports_in_core, "dependency-inversion"
    if fake_adapter_cases < 8:
        return False, fake_adapter_cases, "adapter-evidence"
    if snapshot_mutations > 0:
        return False, snapshot_mutations, "snapshot-isolation"
    assert ui_imports_in_core == 0 and snapshot_mutations == 0
    return True, fake_adapter_cases, "pure-core-boundary"

content.title: Evidence is more than syntax
content.text: The structural check is only one gate. The following changed-case decision and explanation must also hold.

hints: For Maze solving, Tkinter, and Python Extend the cumulative artifact · Lab Architecture Evidence, name the player, revision, Python, Tcl and Tk versions, grid, coordinate, seed, topology, frontier, path, event, state, render, accessibility, package, recovery, and native-transfer boundary, Architecture Evidence precondition, or invariant that must hold.

At Maze solving, Tkinter, and Python Extend the cumulative artifact · Lab Architecture Evidence, trace this concrete input and predict coordinate, wall, topology, frontier, route, callback, transition, render, accessibility, failure, rollback, recovery, and native evidence before reviewing it: A lab puzzle team handles case 1754 during a clean desktop release rehearsal. Build deterministic Python evidence to enforce a pure domain core, narrow UI ports, immutable snapshots, and testable dependency direction; the player cannot rely on color or animation; then change the grid dimensions and preserve every invariant. Browser code uses pure bounded models and original fixed fixtures only. Real Tcl, Tk, tkinter, windows, Canvas, fonts, focus, input devices, assistive technology, files, platform timing, installers, and packaged desktop behavior require explicit controlled native transfer gates. Competency probe: Demonstrate pure-core tests, fake adapters, dependency inspection, native adapter smoke, and changed implementation evidence.

For Maze solving, Tkinter, and Python Extend the cumulative artifact · Lab Architecture Evidence, challenge the documented misconception with changed-grid, seed, wall, generator, solver, weight, heuristic, callback, state, focus, scale, save, package, recovery, and controlled native-transfer evidence: A class diagram proves runtime dependency direction.

lines.text: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Demonstrate pure-core tests, fake adapters, dependency inspection, native adapter smoke, and changed implementation evidence.

options.text: Reject the unsupported conclusion, name the violated Architecture Evidence condition, repair the responsible layer, and rerun the boundary trace.
Keep the plausible output and hide the assumption to avoid confusing the stakeholder. That claim does not survive the test an acceptance boundary evidence boundary.

For test an acceptance boundary, solve one convenient seeded maze, omit revision, coordinate and wall invariants, topology oracle, frontier trace, changed algorithm or heuristic, callback ownership, keyboard and structured-text access, native Tk evidence, failure, recovery, and package transfer, then accept a screenshot as maze proof.

content.text: Use the case, one assumption, one observable result, and one limitation. Do not copy the competency statement: Demonstrate pure-core tests, fake adapters, dependency inspection, native adapter smoke, and changed implementation evidence.
